title: IMMZD18SCholeraWCVaccines ValueSet for Decision Table Display Values
description: Display values for IMMZD18SCholeraWCVaccines ValueSet for Decision Table ValueSet codes. Generated from FHIR expansions. Keys are code fragments (the part after '#' in the canonical IRI). The full IRI can be reconstructed as system + '#' + code.

fhir:displays.description: Multilingual display values for ValueSet codes keyed by code fragment

^.+$.description: Display values for a specific code fragment by language

^[a-z]{2}(-[A-Z]{2})?$.description: Display value in the specified language (ISO 639-1 code)

Child's birth and no cholera doses have.en: Child's birth and no cholera doses have been administered

The primary series has been completed-93.en: The primary series has been completed

Primary series for cholera has been comp.en: Primary series for cholera has been completed and latest cholera dose was administered more than 3 years ago

First cholera booster dose was administe.en: First cholera booster dose was administered

Revaccination with booster series has be.en: Revaccination with booster series has been completed in the last 3 years
